snippet.description:
Today I played Roblox Roll Your Cookie! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: VOUGHT RISING LEAKED TEASER TRAILER !😱🔥
snippet.description:
VOUGHT RISING LEAKED TEASER TRAILER !😱🔥

The first footage from the upcoming The Boys universe spinoff Vought Rising has finally surfaced online, and fans are already going crazy over it 🔥

During special theater screenings of The Boys Season 5 finale on May 19, audiences reportedly got an exclusive first look at the Vought Rising trailer attached before the main presentation. Shortly after that, short clips from the teaser began spreading online, giving fans their very first glimpse into the next chapter of The Boys universe.

In this video, we break down the leaked Vought Rising footage, analyze the scenes shown in the teaser, and talk about what this spinoff could mean for the future of The Boys franchise. Even though only a few seconds of footage have surfaced publicly so far, fans are already speculating about new characters, darker storylines, possible Vought connections, and how this series could expand the brutal superhero world established by The Boys.

Unlike fan-made edits or AI concepts circulating online, this footage comes directly from theater-recorded material shown during the official screenings, making it one of the first real looks at Vought Rising.

With The Boys universe continuing to grow through spinoffs and connected stories, Vought Rising could become a major addition alongside projects connected to Homelander, Butcher, Soldier Boy, and the future of Vought.

snippet.title: Louis Dunford - The Angel (North London Forever) - Live in North London
snippet.description:
Louis Dunford - The Angel - (Live in North London)

Listen to Louis Dunford - Live In North London: LouisDunford.lnk.to/LiveInNorthLondonAY

Get my album Last Orders (Deluxe): https://LouisDunford.lnk.to/lastordersAY

Follow Louis:
Instagram: https://LouisDunford.lnk.to/socialsAY
Twitter: https://LouisDunford.lnk.to/socialsAY
YouTube: https://LouisDunford.lnk.to/socialsAY
TikTok: https://LouisDunford.lnk.to/socialsAY
Facebook: https://LouisDunford.lnk.to/socialsAY

Lyrics: 

As I walk these streets alone, through this borough I call home
Upon the baron fields of Highbury 'neath the stadiums of stone
Through the turnstiles at The Angel, see the homeless on the green
From The Cally to The Cross, and every shithole in between
Pass the church, the mosque, a crack den, and the offie on the corner
See the brasses from the brothel that pretends to be a sauna
Watch the bedlam in the bookies, see the winners and the losers
Seeking solace from their sorrows in the local battle cruisers
Through the madness in the market, weathered faces turn to greet ya
"Hello guvnor, how's your mother?"
"You alright son, be lucky, geeza"
Double pie and mash and liquor, a Cuppa Rosie Lee up chap
Or watch retired gangsters bicker, everyday in Arthur's cafe
The little fuckers causing trouble, for the cozzers make you smile
You meet ya muckers for a couple, forget your troubles for a while
From The Thornhill to The Hemmy, all the faces are the same
'Cause the manor might be changing, but the people still remain
North London forever
Whatever the weather
These streets are our own
And my heart will leave you never
My blood will forever
Run through the stone
As I walk these streets alone, through a kingdom made of Chrome
I see them ripping up the cobbles, and tearing down our childhood homes
I see the architecture changing, watch the history disappear
And the skyline rearranging into towers of veneer
But I see the remnants of the London that they thought they could erase
Every time I hear the old school talk about the good old days
Or every time I watch the football and have a ruby with the lads
See an hoister selling clobber or a dealer shooting bags
It's in the single mothers juggling a baby and a job
In every single brother struggling that wound up in the dock
It's in the roots and the foundations still clinging to the land
It's in the bricks that built the Morland and Popham that still stand
It's in my family and my friends, in every gram and every Benz
It's in the roots that we inherit when a generation ends
It's in the ruins of your youth and the faces of your past
'Cause the manor might be changing, but the people always last
North London forever
Whatever the weather
These streets are our own
And my heart will leave you never
My blood will forever
Run through the stone

snippet.description: The Westies is a gritty and kinetic crime drama centering on New York City’s infamously violent Irish gang of the same name. The series is set in the early 1980s when the construction of the Jacob Javits Convention Center on the Westies’ home turf in Hell’s Kitchen promises a financial windfall. Despite being outnumbered fifty-to-one by the Five Families of the Italian Mafia, the Westies’ legendary brutality and cunning have given them the leverage necessary to share the spoils through a fragile détente. But internal conflict between the brash younger generation and the old-school leadership threatens to set a match to this powder keg, which will sweep the Westies into the FBI’s ever-deepening investigation into the Italian mafia.

snippet.title: JIMMY – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
At the height of his career, Academy Award in hand, Jimmy Stewart chose service over stardom.

Watch KJ Apa in the new trailer for #JIMMY, the incredible true story of America’s most-beloved actor and the iconic role that saved him.

Exclusively in theaters November 6, 2026.

Follow Us on Social:
https://www.instagram.com/jimmystewartmovie/
https://www.facebook.com/jimmystewartmovie
https://x.com/jimmymovie2026

Visit our site:
https://www.jimmythemovie.com/

Subscribe for more exclusive content:
https://www.youtube.com/@burnsandcoproductions

JIMMY, the untold true story of America’s most-beloved actor and the iconic role that saved him, focuses on the most transformative season in Jimmy Stewart’s life—from winning the Academy Award® for Best Actor in The Philadelphia Story to enlisting and becoming a combat pilot in the U.S. Army Air Corps at the beginning of World War II. He flew twenty missions over Europe, rising to the rank of colonel by the end of the war, only to return home broken and disheartened. Then George Bailey and It’s a Wonderful Life came calling…

Lyrics:

パラッパラッパリラ　我が信者

赦されちゃった　正しかったんだ
お前らみんな　私と祈れば　ふぁ～
邪魔者ばいばい　異論はないない
やっと叶った　清々々々し～

いっぱいいっぱい集めよう
悪者が生きれないように　ごめんなさいマン千切って　ぽいっ
いち、に、さん、死
いっぱいいっぱい集めよう
正しさで満たせるように　真っ赤なじゅうたん渡ってこー！

す！す！め！
パラッパラッパリラ　我が信者
邪魔をする奴ら轢き殺すのだ　えいえい、おー！
パラッパラッパリラ　我が信者
穢れた血を今　塗り替えるのだ　えいえい、おー！

“なんでもにうむ”に則って　あなたの命を奪っちゃいます
秘密のおまじない　はいどうぞ　楽になれよ
“なんでもにうむ”に則って　あなたの心を洗っちゃいます
裏切りは厳罰　最高の指切りしよう


ヒトツ...ヒトハ...

あれだけ忠告したのになあ
005あいつ救えねえわ
寿命の延長ご法度です　あ～無意味な延命おつかれさん

003お前は分かってんなあ
賢い坊やでなによりだ
良い顔してるよ前よりも　私の側に置いてやるよ

いっぱいいっぱい集めよう
悪者が生きれないように　ごめんなさいマン千切って　ぽいっ
いち、に、さん、死
いっぱいいっぱい集めよう
正しさで満たせるように　真っ赤なじゅうたん渡ってこー！

いくよ

す〜す〜め〜！
パラッパラッパリラ　我が信者
教えを破れば腸掻き出すぞ　えいえい、おー！
パラッパラッパリラ　我が信者
馬鹿につける薬は粛清だ　えいえい、おー！

“なんでもにうむ”に従って　さすれば赦しを得られるでしょう
お仕置きのビリビリ　愛だって思えるのよ
“なんでもにうむ”に従って　さあ次のあなたの正義にして
裏切りは厳罰　最高の指切りしよう

パラッパラッパリラ　我が信者
歩みを止めるな　我らが天命　明るい未来に天晴天晴

パラッパラッパリラ　誓えるか？

©MILGRAM

snippet.title: Farsi Lyrics - Dame Raftan - Persian Deep House | دمِ رفتن
snippet.description:
🎵Dame Raftan (دمِ رفتن) – Persian Deep House
A deep emotional Persian deep house track about heartbreak, memories, and the pain of letting go. “Dame Raftan” blends atmospheric melodies, deep rhythms, and emotional vibes to create a powerful late-night mood full of longing and emotion. Perfect for night drives, headphones, and chill emotional moments.

💌Follow Us:
Spotify: https://bit.ly/4alClV9
Apple Music: https://bit.ly/4lCFioh
Instagram: https://bit.ly/4am7MyL
TikTok: https://bit.ly/4aJTmYi
🔔Subscribe for more Farsi songs:
https://www.youtube.com/@FarsiLyrics0?sub_confirmation=1

📖Lyrics: Ali Reza Azar 

بذار این قصه ‌ها سر شن...
بذار این خونه ویرون شه

بذار هر چی اَزم مونده...
دوباره درب و داغون شه

یه کاری کن که بعد از تو...
نتونم با کسی باشم

یه جوری گم بشم تو عشق...
نتونم باز پیدا شم

دلم آروم نمی‌گیره...
تو رو با اون که می‌بینم

تو ذهنم زیر و رو می‌شن...
شبای تلخ و شیرینم

نِگاهم کن دَمِ رفتن...
چقدر افسرده‌ تر می‌شم

تو با اون حیف و میل می‌شی...
منم اینجا هدر می‌شم

snippet.title: 'Araneo TLC' & Fantastic Tames Season 1 'Burrowbuck' Trailer
snippet.description:
Meet the Burrowbuck, a swift and evasive utility creature perfect for mastering map control, misdirection, and brilliant ambushes!

Carve out hidden, bunker-like underground dens and open temporary gateway tunnels for rapid long-distance travel, giving prepared Survivors new ways to reposition, retreat, or spring a trap. When danger closes in, the Burrowbuck can kick up disorienting dust clouds and leave behind concealed hazards for enemies reckless enough to follow. 

The Burrowbuck thrives on misdirection, making it an indispensable asset for your tribe's tactical superiority. Step into the unknown and outsmart your foes with this master of guerrilla warfare!

---

The wait is over. The first community-voted Extra Life TLC creature has officially emerged from the shadows.

The Araneo TLC is now live in ARK: Survival Ascended, transforming this once-overlooked crawler into a far more capable ambush predator. These overgrown spiders no longer cling to the ground alone, using web-lines to traverse elevated terrain, reposition through the environment, and descend on unsuspecting prey from above with unnerving precision.

Armed with new mobility options, updated saddle functionality, and more versatile webbing, the Araneo now fills a unique role that blends traversal, control, and tactical support. Whether you’re weaving through difficult terrain, setting traps, or stalking your next target from the ceiling, this eight-legged menace is ready to spin a very different story across the ARKs.

Thank you again to everyone who supported Extra Life and helped bring this TLC to life. Next stop, Therizinosaurus!
